baseline_solo.agent_role_label: Baseline Solo Agent (single-shot evidence ingestion, no decomposition)
evidence_used: alternative_data_features (wikipedia pageviews 30-day window, no meme/retail spike)
sentiment_community_ownership_evidence (analyst ratings mixed, no ownership data)
filing_confirmation (8-K Item 2.05 on 2025-01-14, stub text only)
evidence_missing: narrative_price_gap_assessment (not_evaluated; no LLM reasoning in v1)
news_event_summary catalyst detail (no items in window)
alternative_data_features (most adapters not_connected; only wikipedia_pageviews and fmp_sentiment available)
baseline_solo.reasoning_summary: BF-B fails fundamental_gate_38 on two hard criteria: eps_ttm_or_net_income_ttm_not_positive and operating_margin_not_available. Macro regime is overheat/moderately restrictive (equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation_caution). Valuation is moderate (PE 16, PB 3.17) but fundamentals are insufficient for quality_long sleeve. No catalyst narrative (news_event_summary empty post-cutoff). Alternative data shows normal wikipedia pageviews (no meme spike). Analyst sentiment is mixed (3 strong buy, 2 buy, 11 hold, 2 sell, 3 strong sell as of 2025-03-01). Filing on 2025-01-14 (Item 2.05, stub text) does not constitute a verified catalyst. Insufficient evidence + hard fundamental gate failure → no_trade.
risk_flags: Hard fundamental gate failure blocks both surge_short and quality_long sleeves
Macro regime strict_quality_and_valuation_caution limits equity exposure to 20%
Valuation inputs are TTM (not PIT-safe); no fiscal anchor for fundamentals
Alternative data adapters mostly not_connected; only wikipedia_pageviews and fmp_sentiment available
Filing confirmation is stub mode (binary not installed); cannot verify 8-K Item 2.05 content
No recent insider activity (Form 4 shows 0 transactions in 90d lookback)
Analyst ratings show persistent mixed sentiment (hold-heavy distribution)
suggested_improvements: Wire alternative_data adapters (consumer_traffic, bank_regulatory, etc.) to capture industry-specific signals
Install sec_8k_fulltext binary or enable OpenCLI adapter to extract actual 8-K text
Obtain PIT-safe fundamental snapshot (income/balance/cashflow with accepted_date <= cutoff)
Implement narrative_price_gap_assessment LLM reasoning to evaluate filing vs. price move
Fetch 13F ownership data (currently not_available_on_current_plan) to assess institutional positioning
Extend news_event_summary lookback or cross-check with polygon_news for missed catalysts

data_quality_flags.detail: fundamental_snapshot status=insufficient_evidence; no PIT-safe quarterly data available
news_event_summary: 20 items dropped because publishedDate > cutoff; 0 items remain
github_public: unmapped_ticker — BF-B not in ticker_to_github.csv
sec_8k_fulltext: stub mode (deterministic, not ground truth); binary not installed
valuation_snapshot ratios_ttm flagged not_PIT_safe — for display only, not PIT inputs
live quote timestamp 2026-05-07T19:59:59+00:00 is after allowed_data_cutoff; use last_eod_close 33.11 for PIT anchoring

baseline_solo.schema_or_prompt_weakness_notes: v1 generator does not populate narrative_price_gap_assessment (LLM reasoning pending); information_integrity_assessment and sentiment_community_ownership_evidence are placeholders. Alternative data adapters are mostly not_connected. These gaps reduce confidence in catalyst detection and corroboration. Baseline solo agent must collapse all reasoning into one shot without upstream specialist verdicts.
recommended_followups: Resubmit BF-B when fundamental_snapshot becomes available (PIT-safe income/balance/cashflow)
Monitor for next earnings announcement (no upcoming earnings in corporate_calendar)
Cross-check 8-K Item 2.05 (2025-01-14) with investor relations or press release when sec_8k_fulltext binary is available
Reassess if macro regime shifts from overheat to risk-on (would relax equity_discipline)
Track insider activity (Form 4) for CEO/CFO buying signals
baseline_solo.reason: Hard fundamental gate failure (eps_ttm_or_net_income_ttm_not_positive, operating_margin_not_available) + insufficient_evidence on fundamentals block both sleeves. Macro regime strict_quality_and_valuation_caution. No verified catalyst. Alternative data sparse. Fail-closed per rule §13.4.
risk_notes: Macro regime overheat/moderately_restrictive limits equity to 20% allocation
Valuation moderate (PE 16, PB 3.17) but fundamentals insufficient for quality_long
Filing stub text cannot verify 8-K Item 2.05 content
Analyst sentiment mixed (hold-heavy); no institutional sponsorship signal
No insider buying (Form 4 shows 0 transactions in 90d)

rule_engine_path: 3. Check macro_regime: overheat/moderately_restrictive, equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation_caution → restrict to quality_long only
4. Check fundamental_snapshot: status=insufficient_evidence → cannot confirm quality_long thesis
5. Check news_event_summary: status=data_unavailable, items_count=0 → no catalyst narrative
6. Check alternative_data_features: adapters mostly not_connected; wikipedia_pageviews shows normal activity (no meme spike) → no corroboration
7. Check sentiment_community_ownership_evidence: analyst ratings mixed (hold-heavy); ownership_positioning not_evaluated → no institutional sponsorship signal
8. Check filing_confirmation: 8-K Item 2.05 on 2025-01-14, stub text only → cannot verify content
9. Collapse to decision: insufficient_evidence + hard_risk_limit_breached → decision=veto, position_size_pct=0.0
decision_log: T1: Evaluate envelope: lookahead_safe=true, data_after_cutoff_used=false → PIT-safe
T2: Evaluate fundamental_gate_38: passes=false → hard veto triggered
T3: Evaluate macro_regime: overheat/moderately_restrictive, equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation_caution → restrict equity to 20%
T4: Evaluate fundamental_snapshot: status=insufficient_evidence → cannot anchor quality_long thesis
T5: Evaluate news_event_summary: status=data_unavailable, items_count=0 → no catalyst narrative
T6: Evaluate alternative_data_features: wikipedia_pageviews (30-day window, normal activity), fmp_sentiment (mixed analyst ratings), most adapters not_connected → no corroboration
T7: Evaluate sentiment_community_ownership_evidence: analyst ratings 3 SB / 2 B / 11 H / 2 S / 3 SS (as of 2025-03-01), ownership_positioning not_evaluated → no institutional signal
T8: Evaluate filing_confirmation: 8-K Item 2.05 on 2025-01-14, sec_8k_fulltext stub mode → cannot verify content
T9: Evaluate corporate_calendar: no upcoming earnings/dividends near decision → no near-term catalyst
T10: Collapse to decision: insufficient_evidence + hard_risk_limit_breached + macro_regime_restrictive → decision=veto, position_size_pct=0.0
baseline_solo.community_attention_risk_note: Wikipedia pageviews show normal activity (30-day window, peak 276 views on 2025-02-26, current 148 on 2025-03-03); no abnormal retail attention detected.

baseline_solo.thesis_confirmation_block_reason: fundamental_snapshot status=insufficient_evidence; narrative_price_gap_assessment not_evaluated; alternative_data adapters mostly not_connected; hard fundamental gate failure blocks both sleeves.
baseline_solo.sentiment_risk_adjustment_note: Analyst ratings mixed (hold-heavy distribution); no sentiment spike detected. Sentiment is descriptor-only per §11.13; cannot override hard gate failure.
baseline_solo.ownership_risk_adjustment_note: ownership_positioning not_evaluated; 13F/Form4/Def14A not wired. Form 4 shows 0 insider transactions in 90d lookback. No institutional sponsorship signal available.
baseline_solo.institutional_sponsorship_note: No institutional ownership data available (13F not_available_on_current_plan). Analyst ratings show mixed sentiment but are descriptor-only per §11.13.
baseline_solo.smart_money_benchmark_note: No smart money positioning data available. Analyst ratings (mixed) are descriptor-only and cannot override hard fundamental gate failure.
